name: discord-automation-workers
description: Cloudflare Worker suite for Discord moderation and automation

scripts.test: sh -c 'rm -rf dist-tests; pnpm run build:test && node --test dist-tests/test/*.test.js; status=$?; rm -rf dist-tests; exit $status'

BOT_USER_ID.description: Your Discord bot user's ID from the Discord Developer Portal.

DISCORD_PUBLIC_KEY.description: The Discord application public key used to verify interaction signatures.

DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID.description: Your Discord application ID for syncing slash commands during gateway bootstrap.

DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN.description: The Discord bot token for gateway access and slash-command sync.

ADMIN_AUTH_SECRET.description: Optional bearer token that protects the `/admin/*` routes.
